headline: Where Analysts Pushed Back On PEP Stock's Latest Earnings Call
summary: PepsiCo management spent its latest earnings call defending its big bet on North American growth, and the answers revealed exactly where the strategy is under pressure.

raw.headline: Where Analysts Pushed Back On PEP Stock's Latest Earnings Call

headline: 4 Dividend Kings Are Crushing the S&P 500 in 2026 and Still Have Big Upside Potential
summary: While growth investors scrambled for cover in 2026, a quiet group of battle-tested income stocks started leaving the S&P 500 in the dust. Four Dividend Kings with decades of unbroken payouts are now posting returns that would make most momentum traders jealous, and Wall Street thinks they still have room to run.

headline: Citigroup Maintains Buy on Monster Beverage, Raises Price Target to $113
summary: Citigroup  analyst Filippo Falorni   maintains Monster Beverage (NASDAQ:MNST) with a Buy and raises the price target from $100 to $113.
